sun.en: The sun rises in the east.

sunny.en: It is a bright and sunny day.

supermarket.en: Mom buys food at the supermarket.

sure.en: I am sure he will pass the test.

surprise.en: The party was a big surprise for her.
surprise.zh: 這個派對對她來說是個大驚喜。

surprised.en: I was surprised to see him here.
surprised.zh: 在這裡看到他我很驚訝。

sweet.en: This cake is too sweet for me.
sweet.zh: 這個蛋糕對我來說太甜了。

table.en: We eat dinner at the table.

tail.en: The dog wagged its tail happily.
tail.zh: 那隻狗開心地搖著尾巴。

take.en: Please take an umbrella with you.

tall.en: He is the tallest boy in the class.

tape.en: She fixed the box with tape.

taxicab-taxi-cab.en: We took a taxi to the airport.

tea.en: She drinks a cup of tea every afternoon.

teacher.en: Our teacher is kind and patient.
teacher.zh: 我們的老師既親切又有耐心。

teenager.zh: 許多青少年喜歡流行音樂。

temple.en: Many people visit the old temple.
temple.zh: 許多人參觀這座古老的寺廟。

test.en: We have an English test tomorrow.

thank.en: I want to thank you for your help.

the.en: The sun is very bright today.

theater.en: We watched a play at the theater.
theater.zh: 我們在劇院看了一齣戲。

then.en: First wash your hands, then eat.

there.en: There is a cat under the table.

these.en: These apples are fresh and sweet.

they.en: They are playing in the park.

thin.en: The ice on the lake is thin.

thing.en: I have many things to do today.

think.en: I think it will rain soon.

third.en: She finished third in the race.
third.zh: 她在比賽中得了第三名。

though.en: Though it was late, he kept working.
though.zh: 雖然很晚了，他仍繼續工作。

thousand.en: A thousand people came to the concert.

through.en: The train went through a long tunnel.

throw.en: Don't throw trash on the ground.

tie.en: He wears a tie to work.

tiger.en: The tiger is a strong animal.
tiger.zh: 老虎是一種強壯的動物。

tip.en: She gave me a useful tip for studying.
tip.zh: 她給了我一個有用的讀書建議。

tired.en: I am tired after the long walk.
tired.zh: 走了那麼遠的路，我累了。

to.en: I go to school by bus.

toe.en: I hurt my toe on the chair.
toe.zh: 我的腳趾撞到椅子受傷了。

tomato.en: I put a tomato in my salad.
tomato.zh: 我在沙拉裡放了一顆番茄。

tonight.en: We will watch a movie tonight.

too.en: I am tired, and I am hungry too.

tool.en: A hammer is a useful tool.

top.en: The flag is at the top of the pole.

topic.en: Our topic today is the weather.
topic.zh: 我們今天的主題是天氣。

total.en: The total cost is one hundred dollars.

touch.en: Please do not touch the paintings.

towel.en: She dried her hands with a towel.

town.en: I grew up in a small town.

toy.en: The baby is playing with a toy.

traffic.en: The traffic is heavy in the morning.

train.en: We took the train to Taipei.

treat.en: We should treat others with kindness.

tree.en: Birds build nests in the tree.

trip.en: We took a trip to the mountains.

trouble.en: He got into trouble for being late.
trouble.zh: 他因為遲到惹上了麻煩。

t-shirt.en: He is wearing a blue T-shirt.

turn.en: It is your turn to read.

twice.en: I brush my teeth twice a day.

type.en: What type of music do you like?
type.zh: 你喜歡哪種類型的音樂？

uncle.en: My uncle gave me a nice gift.
uncle.zh: 我叔叔送了我一份很棒的禮物。

under.en: The cat is sleeping under the chair.
under.zh: 那隻貓在椅子底下睡覺。

uniform.en: Students wear a uniform to school.

until.en: We waited until the rain stopped.

up.en: The balloon went up into the sky.

usually.en: I usually get up at six.

vegetable.en: Eat more vegetables to stay healthy.

video.en: We watched a funny video online.
video.zh: 我們在網路上看了一部好笑的影片。

visit.en: We will visit our grandparents this weekend.
visit.zh: 我們這週末要去拜訪祖父母。

visitor.en: The museum has many visitors today.
visitor.zh: 今天博物館有很多遊客。

wait.en: Please wait for me at the gate.

wake.en: I wake up at seven every morning.

walk.en: We walk the dog every evening.

wall.en: There is a clock on the wall.

want.en: I want a glass of cold water.

watch.en: We watch the stars at night.

wave.en: The waves are high at the beach today.

way.en: Can you show me the way to the station?
way.zh: 你能告訴我去車站的路嗎？

weak.en: He felt weak after his illness.

wear.en: She wears a hat on sunny days.

week.en: There are seven days in a week.

weekend.en: We go hiking on the weekend.

west.en: The sun sets in the west.

wet.en: My clothes are wet from the rain.

what.zh: 你最喜歡的顏色是什麼？

whether.en: I don't know whether he will come.

who.en: Who is that boy over there?

why.en: Why are you so happy today?
why.zh: 你今天為什麼這麼開心？

wide.en: The river is very wide here.

win.en: I hope our team will win.

window.en: Please open the window for some air.

wise.en: My grandfather is a wise old man.
wise.zh: 我爺爺是個有智慧的老人。

with.en: I went to the park with my friends.

without.en: Don't go out without your jacket.

woman.en: The woman is reading a newspaper.

wonderful.en: We had a wonderful time at the party.
wonderful.zh: 我們在派對上玩得很開心。

word.en: I learned a new word today.
word.zh: 我今天學了一個新單字。

work.en: My father goes to work by train.

world.en: She wants to travel around the world.

worry.en: Don't worry, everything will be fine.
worry.zh: 別擔心，一切都會沒事的。

write.zh: 請在這裡寫下你的名字。

wrong.en: There is something wrong with my computer.

yard.en: The children are playing in the yard.

year.en: There are twelve months in a year.

yes-yeah.en: Yes, I would love to come.

yet.en: I haven't finished my homework yet.

young.en: She is too young to drive.

zoo.en: We saw elephants at the zoo.
zoo.zh: 我們在動物園看到大象。
